title: meibomia rufescens
intro: Meibomia rufescens, also known as the hairy woods rose or woodland rose, is a perennial flowering plant native to the eastern and central regions of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Meibomia rufescens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
